heading: Reports to Congress by Secretary of Energy
label: 2709 Reports to Congress by Secretary of Energy
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was omitted from the Code.Section 5914 of title 42

children.text: a current comprehensive program definition for implementing this chapter;
an evaluation of the state of automobile propulsion system research and development in the United States;
the number and amount of contracts and grants made under this chapter;
an analysis of the progress made in developing advanced automobile propulsion system technology; and
suggestions for improvements in advanced automobile propulsion system research and development, including recommendations for legislation.

children.heading: Study on financial obligation guarantees
children.label: b Study on financial obligation guarantees
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall conduct a survey of developers, lending institutions, and other appropriate persons or institutions and shall otherwise make a study for the purpose of determining whether, and under what conditions, research, development, demonstration, and commercial availability of advanced automobile propulsion system technology may be aided by the guarantee of financial obligations by the Federal Government. The Secretary of Energy shall report the results of such survey and study to the Congress within 1 year after . Such report shall include an examination of those stages of advanced automobile propulsion system technology research, development, demonstration, and commercialization for which financial obligation guarantees may be useful or appropriate and shall contain such legislative recommendations as may be necessary.February 25, 1978
